summary: Frontend regression for invoice/customer click-to-drill-down across 7 pages plus shadcn Dialog migration of TerminalUpdateReceiptModal/TerminalReturnRefundModal. Sales page click-flow verified end-to-end (25 customer-link buttons with data-testid; click opens shadcn Dialog role='dialog' with title 'Statement of Account — John Gil Ahig'; Escape key closes). Accounting > Receivables tab: 99 clickable customer buttons; click opens Statement modal correctly. Reports default + AR Aging tabs: 41 customer buttons rendered and styled. Dashboard, DailyLog, AuditCenter buttons are coded in source (verified via grep) but row counts at runtime are data-dependent (no recent credit sales / open AR rows on test day). Close Wizard renders 'Please select a branch first' gate before listing data — code is wired (6 sites) but not exercised in this run. Both terminal modals lint clean and use shadcn <Dialog> with role='dialog', data-testid hooks, multi-step wizard preserved, same /api/returns and /api/invoices/<id>/correct-incomplete-stock payloads. No backend testing performed (request was frontend only).

console_warnings.issue: React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop. Check the render method of `tbody`. It was passed a child from ArAgingReport.' Indicates a mapped row in the AR Aging table is missing a key={...} prop. Functional impact: none (rows render). Code-quality impact: noisy console + potential reconciliation issues on row updates.

sales_page.modal_title_format_correct: PASS ('Statement of Account — John Gil Ahig')

dashboard_page.customer_buttons_present_at_runtime: PARTIAL (1 hover-underline button found; data-dependent on recent activity)

daily_log_page.customer_buttons_at_runtime: PARTIAL (no credit sales / cash drawer rows today)
daily_log_page.code_wiring: PASS (7 buttons wired: lines 112, 122, 509, 605, 975, 1007, 1376 + openCustStmt helper at 232)

audit_center_page.customer_buttons_at_runtime: PARTIAL (test heuristic captured 'View all →' link which also uses hover:underline)
audit_center_page.code_wiring: PASS (stmt state at 503-504, 4 customer button sites at ~1146/1198/1215/1503/1726)

close_wizard_page.renders_branch_gate: Page shows 'Please select a branch first to run the Close Wizard.' — customer rows not rendered without branch context
close_wizard_page.code_wiring: PASS (stmt state at 89-91, 6 button sites at 1052/1112/1140/1668/1782/1812)

reports_page.code_wiring: PASS (3 separate stmt state pairs in ArAgingReport, SalesReport, DiscountAuditReport)

accounting_page.expenses_tab_default: 0 customer-name buttons (expected — expenses table uses different styling for 'Billed to: Customer Name' which is text not button)
accounting_page.receivables_tab: PASS (99 clickable customer-name buttons; 'John Gil Ahig' click opened Statement modal successfully)

terminal_modals_migration.business_logic_preserved: PASS (payload to /api/invoices/<id>/correct-incomplete-stock unchanged; payload to /api/returns unchanged; multi-step state machine 1→2→3→4 preserved)
terminal_modals_migration.lint_clean: PASS (no ESLint issues on either file)
terminal_modals_migration.runtime_render_verification: SKIPPED (DocViewerPage requires QR scan/token to load — lint + code review confirms shadcn migration is correct; main agent's Sales smoke-test already proves the dialog primitive works in this app)

action_items: (LOW) Fix missing key prop in ArAgingReport row map — React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop. Check render of tbody. It was passed a child from ArAgingReport.' Add key={row.customer_id || idx} to the .map() inside the AR Aging tbody.

(INFO) Close Wizard customer-button wiring is data-gated by branch selection. Recommend manual smoke-test with a branch selected + a daily session having released invoices to confirm 6 wired sites render clickable customer names.

(INFO) Daily Log customer-button wiring is data-gated by today's credit sales / cash drawer entries. Recommend manual smoke-test on a day with credit sales activity to confirm 7 wired sites all render.
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 pages correctly reuse the shared CustomerStatementModal component — no duplicate modal definitions created. Spec compliant.
Click handlers consistently use stopPropagation()/separate button (e.g. SalesPage.js:245) so customer-name click does not also fire the row-level invoice click — dual-click safety verified.

Walk-in customer rendering: SalesPage.js correctly renders plain text when !s.customer_id (verified in code: ternary `s.customer_id ? <button...> : s.customer_name`). Same pattern used across DailyLogPage and AccountingPage.

TerminalUpdateReceiptModal & TerminalReturnRefundModal: payload shape and endpoints unchanged from previous raw-overlay version. Only presentation wrapper changed (raw <div fixed inset-0> → <Dialog>). Lint clean.
ArAgingReport tbody map is missing key prop — single console error caught during reports page test.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested code paths (Sales end-to-end, Accounting Receivables end-to-end, Reports tab counts, Terminal modal lint+structure). Data-gated paths (DailyLog/CloseWizard/AuditCenter/Dashboard) verified via source-grep wiring.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales /sales page is the canonical end-to-end happy path: 25 customer-link buttons with data-testid='customer-link-<id>'. Accounting Receivables tab is the second canonical end-to-end with 99 buttons. For pages where buttons are data-gated (DailyLog, CloseWizard, AuditCenter, Dashboard), select Branch 1 (c435277f-9fc7-4d83-83e7-38be5b4423ac) and run on a day with credit sales/cash-drawer transactions. ArAgingReport has a missing-key React warning; main agent should add key={row.customer_id} or key={idx} to the row map. Terminal modals were verified by source review + lint only (DocViewerPage requires QR token); no functional regressions found.
